privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.introBody: CertReady ("we", "our") respects your privacy. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, disclose, and safeguard your information when you use our website and learning platform (the "Services").
privacy.collect1: Account information (name, email, password when you register)
privacy.collect2: Payment information (processed by our payment provider; we do not store full card details)
privacy.collect3: Usage data (courses accessed, progress, answers to practice questions)
privacy.collect4: Device and log data (IP address, browser type, pages visited)
privacy.use1: Provide and maintain the Services, including course access and progress tracking
privacy.use3: Send transactional emails (e.g. purchase confirmation, password reset)
privacy.use4: Respond to your requests and improve our Services
privacy.cookiesBody: We may use cookies and similar technologies for essential operation (e.g. keeping you signed in), analytics, and to improve the user experience. You can control cookies through your browser settings.
privacy.retentionBody: We retain your account and course progress data for as long as your account is active or as needed to provide the Services and comply with legal obligations. You may request deletion of your account and associated data by contacting us.
privacy.sharingBody: We do not sell your personal information. We may share data with service providers (e.g. hosting, payment processing, email delivery) who act on our behalf under strict confidentiality. We may disclose information if required by law or to protect our rights and safety.
privacy.rightsBody: Depending on your location, you may have the right to:
privacy.rights1: Access, correct, or delete your personal data
privacy.rights2: Object to or restrict certain processing
privacy.rights3: Data portability. Contact us to exercise these rights.
privacy.securityBody: We use industry-standard measures to protect your data (e.g. encryption, secure connections). No method of transmission over the internet is 100% secure; we cannot guarantee absolute security.
privacy.contactBody: For privacy-related questions or to exercise your rights, contact us at:

about.title: About Us
about.seoTitle: About CertReady — Red Seal Exam Prep
about.seoDescription: CertReady started with the Hairstylist course. Learn about our team and how trade professionals help shape our courses.
about.intro: CertReady helps Canadian tradespeople prepare for Red Seal and Skilled Trades Ontario certification exams. Our courses are built on official curriculum standards and designed with input from experienced professionals.
about.hairstylistPara: The platform began with our Hairstylist (332A) exam prep course. To ensure the content is accurate and relevant, we worked with a practising professional from the trade.
about.marynaBio: Maryna V. was involved in the composition of the Hairstylist course. She is a professional with over 15 years of experience in the trade and helped align the material with real-world practice and exam expectations.
about.cooperateHeading: Work with us to improve a course
about.cooperatePara: If you are a professional in another trade with feedback or ideas on how to improve any of our courses, we would be glad to cooperate. Get in touch — we value input from practising tradespeople and educators.

home.launchOfferNote: Launch offer: first 100 customers per course pay $29.99 (then regular price).

faqs.question: What's included in the course?
faqs.answer: Each course includes comprehensive chapters covering all exam topics, 75+ practice questions with detailed explanations, a full-length mock exam, key term glossary, and lifetime access to all materials.

faqs.question: How long do I have access?
faqs.answer: You have lifetime access to the course materials. There's no expiration date, so you can study at your own pace and revisit the content anytime.

faqs.question: What if I fail the exam?
faqs.answer: While we can't guarantee you'll pass, our courses are designed to give you the best possible preparation. You'll have lifetime access to review the materials and retake the exam as needed.

faqs.question: Is this official STO material?
faqs.answer: Our courses are based on the official Skilled Trades Ontario curriculum standards and are designed to help you prepare for the certification exam. However, we are not affiliated with STO.

faqs.question: What payment methods are accepted?
faqs.answer: We accept all major credit cards through our secure Stripe payment processor. Payment is processed securely and you'll receive immediate access upon purchase.

faqs.question: Can I get a refund?
faqs.answer: Due to the digital nature of our courses, we do not offer refunds. However, you can preview the first 2 chapters for free before purchasing to ensure the course meets your needs.

tradeGuidePage.guideTitle: {{tradeName}} Red Seal Exam — Complete Study Guide ({{tradeCode}})
tradeGuidePage.introParagraph: The {{tradeName}} Red Seal interprovincial exam is a {{count}}-question multiple-choice examination that tests knowledge across every aspect of the trade. Passing requires a minimum score of {{passMark}}%. This guide covers everything you need to know: exam structure, topic weightings, what to focus on, and how to prepare effectively.
